translated: I was just acting calm, but my heart was pounding.
I really didn't know what to do.
You deserve a huge round of applause. It was amazing.
And before me... well, right before me was Pay-chan.
Sumire's song and her performance were just so overwhelming. Everyone was great, but...
Sumire had this incredible confidence,
and Pay-chan is so talented. So, following that...
there was a lot of pressure when I went out there.
But I felt like looking too desperate wouldn't be very Tomari-like.
I see, I see.
So I practiced as hard as I could,
and gave it my all.
But watching the stream back, there are so many things...
I wish I had done differently.
So if I ever get to do it again,
I want to raise the quality of my performance even more.
Right, right.
But it was a lot of fun.
And that costume really suited you, too.
What did you think of it, Saku?
I was so happy. You know, with "Wild Card"...
when I first heard it, it felt really dark and cool,
with a bit of an alluring vibe.
And...
when the "Behind the Spider" story came out,
I realized the song was about showing a side of Tomari that had never been seen before.
So I always felt like she wanted to show...
that she's more than just "cool."
That's why, while the other costume was also wonderful,
and I liked it too... how should I put it?
I thought if the costume had a completely different vibe from the song,
it would be easier to express Tomari's growth.
I felt this one created a better contrast with the lyrics, so when it was chosen...
Yeah.
I was really happy about it.
Ah, I see.
It really did look great on you.
But I want to see Toma wearing it.
Oh, that would be nice. Definitely.
I'm so happy that everyone's been drawing illustrations of it,
but I hope we can see her in it officially someday.
